title: Skud

{{Top|leg|hide=1}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Skud.jpg]] |name=Skud |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Orleon]] |species=[[Skud's species]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Black]] |skin=[[Red]] |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's criminal empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|How many did we lose ''this'' time?''"
"''Only ''Skud,'' Jabba.|Mosep Bineed (impersonating Jabba the Hutt) and his minion|[[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]]}} '''Skud''' was a red-skinned humanoid henchman of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]]. He accompanied the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to [[Orleon]], but was killed in a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fight with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 28}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Desilijic servants]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
